nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grosbeak starling
nodes.summary: Grosbeak starling（Grosbeak starling，学名 Scissirostrum dubium），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括湿地，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia, where its natural habitat is tropical lowland, and sometimes subtropical montane, lightly wooded forest areas and wetlands. It is threatened in the wild by habitat loss, and by birds being captured for the cagebird trade. This species nests in colonies, which frequently contain hundreds of pairs

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia, where its natural habitat is tropical lowland, and sometimes subtropical montane, lightly wooded forest areas and wetlands. It is threatened in the wild by habitat loss, and by birds being captured for the cagebird trade. This species nests in colonies, which frequently contain hundreds of pairs
